name: Worley Limited
analysis: WOR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$12.9100, stop A$12.2265, target A$14.9605 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
